title: lagenaria leucantha var. hispida
intro: Lagenaria leucantha var. hispida, also known as the hispid calabash gourd, is a variety of the Lagenaria leucantha plant, which is a type of climbing vine belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lagenaria leucantha var. hispida include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and processing the fruit, leaves, or roots, which can be used as teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
